title: gardenia jasminoides var. longisepala
intro: Gardenia jasminoides var. longisepala, also known as the long-lobed gardenia or long-styled gardenia, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, the leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gardenia jasminoides var. longisepala are attributed to its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and well-being.
